an1.82:1.1:
"Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya
saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, pamādo. Pamādo, bhikkhave, mahato anatthāya
saṁvattatī"ti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
an1.83:1.1:
"Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya
saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, appamādo. Appamādo, bhikkhave, mahato atthāya
saṁvattatī"ti.
Dutiyaṁ.
